entries.title: Layout mode
entries.description: Controls whether sections render as a horizontal bar or a vertical sidebar.
notes: Invalid values fall back to horizontal.
Horizontal uses left/center/right zones; vertical uses top/middle/bottom.

entries.title: Color alias
entries.description: Defines a named color alias that can be referenced as $name inside format strings.
notes: Any key beginning with color_ is collected into the alias map.
Values are passed through the existing color parser, so aliases can point to hex, rgb(...), or named colors.

entries.title: Section format entry
entries.description: Defines a section row in a zone, including aligned rows and split left/right pairs.
notes: index must be a positive integer.
zone accepts start/middle/end plus aliases left/center/right/top/bottom.
A _left + _right pair with the same index and zone creates a split row.
A single _left or _right entry without its partner is treated as an aligned row.

entries.title: Zone spacer style
entries.description: Sets the style used for the spacer between major zones.
notes: Most useful in horizontal mode where the bar has visible gaps between start, middle, and end zones.

entries.title: Overlength precedence
entries.description: Controls which zones keep priority when the bar is wider than the terminal.
notes: Use digits 1, 2, and 3 exactly once.
1=start or top, 2=middle, 3=end or bottom.

entries.title: Hide on overlength
entries.description: When true, lower-priority zones are hidden on narrow terminals instead of being squeezed.
notes: The plugin checks for the literal string true.

entries.title: Normal tab format
entries.description: Format string for an inactive tab.

entries.title: Active tab format
entries.description: Format string for the active tab.

entries.title: Normal fullscreen tab format
entries.description: Format string for an inactive tab when fullscreen is active.

entries.title: Active fullscreen tab format
entries.description: Format string for the active tab when fullscreen is active.

entries.title: Normal sync tab format
entries.description: Format string for an inactive tab when sync panes is active.

entries.title: Active sync tab format
entries.description: Format string for the active tab when sync panes is active.

entries.title: Rename tab format
entries.description: Format string for the active tab while Rename Tab mode is active.

entries.title: Horizontal tab separator
entries.description: Separator rendered between tabs in horizontal mode.
notes: Vertical mode does not use the separator between tab rows.

entries.title: Overflow indicator above
entries.description: Indicator shown above the visible tab range in vertical mode.

entries.title: Overflow indicator below
entries.description: Indicator shown below the visible tab range in vertical mode.

entries.title: Tab name max length
entries.description: Maximum display width for tab names before truncation.

entries.title: Vertical tab top padding
entries.description: Number of blank rows to render above the vertical tab list.

entries.title: Vertical tab border
entries.description: Optional right-side border appended to each vertical tab row.

entries.title: Tab index offset
entries.description: Controls the displayed starting index for tabs.

entries.title: Sync indicator
entries.description: Text or icon substituted for {sync_indicator} when sync panes is active.

entries.title: Fullscreen indicator
entries.description: Text or icon substituted for {fullscreen_indicator} when fullscreen is active.

entries.title: Floating panes indicator
entries.description: Text or icon substituted for {floating_indicator} when floating panes are visible.

entries.title: Notifications enabled
entries.description: Turns the notification system on or off.
notes: The aggregate widget and per-tab indicator both respect this flag.

entries.title: Aggregate notification format
entries.description: Format string for the aggregate {notifications} widget.

entries.title: Show aggregate when empty
entries.description: When true, the aggregate notification widget renders even when the count is zero.

entries.title: Per-tab notification fallback format
entries.description: Fallback format for the per-tab {notification} placeholder.

entries.title: Per-tab waiting format
entries.description: Override format for waiting notifications in tab strings.

entries.title: Per-tab in-progress format
entries.description: Override format for in-progress notifications in tab strings.

entries.title: Per-tab completed format
entries.description: Override format for completed notifications in tab strings.

entries.title: Waiting indicator
entries.description: Icon or text used for waiting notifications.

entries.title: In-progress indicator
entries.description: Icon or text used for in-progress notifications.

entries.title: Completed indicator
entries.description: Icon or text used for completed notifications.

entries.title: Mode widget format
entries.description: Defines the rendered label for a specific Zellij input mode.
notes: Any key beginning with mode_ is treated as a mode format.
Unconfigured modes fall back to the plugin's built-in uppercase labels.

entries.title: Datetime format
entries.description: strftime format string used by the datetime widget.

entries.title: Datetime timezone
entries.description: IANA timezone name used by the datetime widget.

entries.title: Swap layout format
entries.description: Format string used by the swap layout widget.

entries.title: Hide empty swap layout
entries.description: When true, hides the swap layout widget if there is no active layout name.

entries.title: Command widget property
entries.description: Defines a command widget instance, including its command, format, polling interval, render mode, click action, and optional working directory.
notes: Supported property suffixes are _command, _format, _interval, _rendermode, _clickaction, and _cwd.
command_<name>_rendermode accepts static, dynamic, or raw.
command_<name>_interval is parsed as a non-negative integer string.

entries.title: Pipe widget format
entries.description: Defines a pipe widget that renders externally supplied data.
notes: Pipe widgets consume values sent through zellij-status::pipe::<name>::<value>.
Use the {output} placeholder to insert the latest pipe payload.

entries.title: Global cap background
entries.description: Background color or alias placed behind generated cap arrows.

entries.title: Global cap foreground
entries.description: Optional override foreground color for generated cap arrows.
notes: If omitted, the cap widget derives its foreground from the source widget fill background when possible.

entries.title: Global cap symbol
entries.description: Override symbol used for generated cap arrows.

entries.title: Scoped cap override
entries.description: Overrides cap styling for a specific source widget, falling back to the global cap settings when absent.
notes: Supported scoped properties are _cap_bg, _cap_fg, and _cap_symbol.
Examples include mode_cap_bg and mode_cap_symbol.
